title: Twitch streamer Uwo’s Lab turns old toilet into functional speaker, goes viral
summary_full: Twitch streamer Uwo's Lab transformed an old toilet into a working speaker, dubbed the "Sh*twoofer," in a viral experiment that he performed.  Despite the sound quality, the project amazed viewers with its creativity, demonstrating that unusual ideas can be brought to life through imagination and electronics, encouraging experimentation and fun.
